canonical_definition: A standardized tool used as a plan validator to check if a sequence of actions correctly transitions from an initial state to a goal state according to the ground-truth domain and problem files.
papers: A Silver Bullet or a Compromise for Full Attention? A Comprehensive Study of Gist Token-based Context Compression
